params._admin: Admin address (owns beacon + can upgrade factory + verify modules)
params._slotImplementation: Address of the Slot implementation contract

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

admin().notice: Factory admin (can upgrade factory, upgrade beacon, verify modules)

beacon().notice: The UpgradeableBeacon that all slot proxies point to

createSlot(address,address,(bool,bool,ad.notice: Deploy a new Slot as a BeaconProxy

createSlots(address,address,(bool,bool,a.notice: Deploy multiple Slot BeaconProxies with the same params

emitEvent(uint8,bytes).notice: Emit a protocol-wide event (called by slots)

initialize(address,address).notice: Initialize the factory (called once via proxy)

isModuleVerified(address).notice: Check if a module is verified

isSlot(address).notice: Tracks deployed slots for emitEvent authorization

migrateSlots(address[]).notice: Migrate pre-existing slots: register + initializeV2 in one call (admin only)

registerSlots(address[]).notice: Register pre-existing slots deployed before this upgrade (admin only)

setModuleVerified(address,bool).notice: Mark a module as verified/unverified (admin only)
